messages.content: You are an OCI specialist with expertise in AWS to OCI migration. Provide technical guidance on S3 to Object Storage migration.
Como criar aws storage no compartment production?

Para migração para OCI:

**Mapeamento de serviços:**
| Source | OCI |
|--------|-----|
| Compute | OCI Compute |
| Storage | Object Storage |
| Database | Autonomous Database |
| Network | VCN |

**Preparação:**
```bash
# Criar VCN
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "migration-vcn" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar compartment
oci iam compartment create \
  --compartment-id <tenancy-ocid> \
  --name "migration-production" \
  --description "Migration compartment"
```

**Database Migration:**
- Use Database Migration Service
- Ou GoldenGate para mínimo downtime

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm

**Mapeamento de serviços:**
| Source | OCI |
|--------|-----|
| Compute | OCI Compute |
| Storage | Object Storage |
| Database | Autonomous Database |
| Network | VCN |

**Preparação:**
```bash
# Criar VCN
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "migration-vcn" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar compartment
oci iam compartment create \
  --compartment-id <tenancy-ocid> \
  --name "migration-sandbox" \
  --description "Migration compartment"
```

**Database Migration:**
- Use Database Migration Service
- Ou GoldenGate para mínimo downtime

Para migração para OCI:

**Mapeamento de serviços:**
| Source | OCI |
|--------|-----|
| Compute | OCI Compute |
| Storage | Object Storage |
| Database | Autonomous Database |
| Network | VCN |

**Preparação:**
```bash
# Criar VCN
oci network vcn create \
  --compartment-id <ocid> \
  --display-name "migration-vcn" \
  --cidr-block "10.0.0.0/16"

# Criar compartment
oci iam compartment create \
  --compartment-id <tenancy-ocid> \
  --name "migration-staging" \
  --description "Migration compartment"
```

**Database Migration:**
- Use Database Migration Service
- Ou GoldenGate para mínimo downtime

Doc: https://docs.oracle.com/en-us/iaas/Content/Migration/overview.htm
